summary: The user is planning to make a stir-fry for dinner and has ordered ingredients through Instacart, seeking a simple recipe and tips to enhance flavor. They also discussed strategies for organizing their fridge and pantry, tracking expiration dates, and the potential benefits of using a pantry inventory app to include prices of items.
facts: The user ordered bell peppers, carrots, broccoli, ground chicken breast, and a few eggs from Instacart but did not receive prices for these items. The user is considering adding aromatics like onions and garlic to their stir-fry but is unsure if they have them at home. The user is interested in organizing their fridge and pantry to reduce food waste and make meal planning easier. The user is thinking of implementing a pantry inventory app to keep track of expiration dates and is considering including prices of items in the app. The user has some garlic at home but is uncertain about the availability of onions.
